title: Aquarius December 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
excerpt: Aquarius December 2026 horoscope: New Moon in Sagittarius (Dec 7, 11th house) + Cold Moon in Cancer (Dec 24, 6th house). Reflect on community, celebrate daily rhythm. Crystal: Selenite.
rank_math_title: Aquarius December 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
rank_math_description: Aquarius December 2026 monthly horoscope — key dates, love, career, health and Crystal of the Month (Selenite). New Moon Dec 7 in Sagittarius (11th house of community); Cold Full Moon Dec 24 in Cancer (6th house of work and health).
content:
Aquarius December 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeReflect on the community, tend the daily rhythm
Key DatesNew Moon Dec 7 (Sagittarius, 11th house) / Jupiter retrograde Dec 12 / Cold Full Moon Dec 24 (Cancer, 6th house)
Love11th house New Moon refreshes friendships and future vision; Venus post-shadow clears Dec 15
Career6th house Cold Moon illuminates daily work and health; Capricorn season Dec 21 invites rest before birthday
Crystal of the MonthSelenite
Lucky ColorsElectric blue, white, silver
Lucky Number11
AffirmationI gather the community that shares my vision; I tend the rhythm that sustains the work.

This Month's Energy

Aquarius, December 2026 closes the year moving from community to daily rhythm. The New Moon in Sagittarius on December 7 falls in your 11th house of friends, groups, networks, and long-term vision — a fresh start in who you gather with and what future you're building. Then Jupiter turns retrograde on December 12 at 27°01' Leo (your 7th house), slowing a partnership expansion and inviting review. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer on December 24 lands in your 6th house of work, routine, and health — a practical, embodied close. December's pattern: gather the community early, tend the rhythm late.

Key Dates for Aquarius in December 2026

DateTransitMeaning for AquariusDo / Avoid
Dec 7New Moon in Sagittarius (your 11th house)Fresh start in friends, groups, networks, long-term vision, future hopesDo: gather allies, name the 2027 vision, join or build the community
Avoid: isolating when the sky is asking for connection
Dec 12Jupiter turns retrograde in Leo (your 7th house)A partnership or marriage expansion pauses; review significant alliancesDo: audit the central relationship, refine the contract, re-examine the alliance
Avoid: forcing a partnership commitment before February 2027
Dec 15Venus post-retrograde shadow endsLove and money conversations clarify; the Uranus-ruled mind can finally settleDo: finalize relationship and financial plans
Avoid: re-opening old Venus-retrograde worth-debates
Dec 21Sun enters Capricorn (your 12th house)Capricorn season invites rest, solitude, and inner work before your birthday season in JanuaryDo: rest, journal, deepen the contemplative practice
Avoid: pushing productivity through a low-energy season
Dec 24Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 6th house)Work, routine, health, daily systems illuminated; a practical culminationDo: commit to a sustainable rhythm, address a health practice, organize the work
Avoid: holiday chaos breaking the structure that sustains you
Dec 31Year-end thresholdNatural review — what 2026 taught about community and rhythmDo: name the allies gathered, the rhythm sustained
Avoid: rushing into January without the depth-work of late December

Career & Money

For Aquarius, December's career story is collective at the top and practical at the bottom. The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 falls in your 11th house of networks, allies, and future vision — a fresh start in the collective dimension of your work. If 2026 isolated you, this New Moon reconnects.

Jupiter retrograde in your 7th house of partnership from December 12 — audit a central working alliance. Capricorn season (your 12th house) from December 21 invites rest and review before your birthday season in January. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 6th house of work and health) on December 24 is the practical culmination — daily systems, routine, wellness. Crystals for wealth can support the year-end review; the practical move is gather the community early, then tend the rhythm.

Love & Relationships

The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 falls in your 11th house of friends and future vision. For Aquarius, this is the love signature of the month: friendship is the form of love that matters most. Whether platonic, romantic, or community — the allies who share your vision are the heart.

Jupiter retrograde in your 7th house of partnership from December 12 — audit a central romantic or business alliance. Venus finishes her post-retrograde shadow on December 15 — commitments made now hold. Uranus-ruled Aquarius sometimes intellectualizes love; December asks for both vision and presence. Crystals for love can support the bond; the deeper practice is gather the community, then meet the one partner from that field.

Health & Wellness

December asks Aquarius to balance social and somatic. The 11th house Sagittarius New Moon lights the social field, while the 6th house Cancer Cold Moon brings it back to body and daily rhythm. Uranus/Saturn-ruled Aquarius carries tension in the lower legs, ankles, and nervous system — the cost of standing apart and standing for the future.

Selenite, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with clarity, mental calm, and nervous-system regulation — a useful symbolic companion for an over-stimulated season. Ankle and calf stretches, hydration, screen breaks, and a real daily rhythm (not just inspired chaos) carry you into January. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Selenite

Why Selenite fits Aquarius this month. You are Uranus/Saturn-ruled and December asks you to do two things at once: gather the community (11th house) and tend the daily rhythm (6th house). Selenite — traditionally tied to clarity, mental calm, purification, and high communication — is the stone that clears the Aquarian mental grid so the body can follow. Where Amethyst would calm and Aquamarine would soothe, Selenite clarifies: translucent, white, with an air-sign affinity for the high clean note. Perfect for the 11th house Sagittarius New Moon (community) and the 6th house Cancer Cold Moon (rhythm).

How to use it during December 2026. Place Selenite on your desk or workspace on December 7 (the Sagittarius New Moon). Keep a Selenite tower near where you work through December 24.

Best date to use it: December 24, the Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 6th house) — hold Selenite at your crown or over your desk for 5 minutes at moonrise, naming the daily rhythm you're committing to in 2027.

Read more: Selenite Meaning and Best Crystals for Aquarius.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Aquarius — December 2026

When: December 24, the Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 6th house).
Crystal: Selenite.
Intention: Tend the rhythm that sustains the work.

  1. Cleanse Selenite by placing it on a windowsill in moonlight on the night of December 7 (the Sagittarius New Moon). Selenite is self-cleansing but benefits from lunar light.
  2. Set the intention in the two weeks between the New Moon and the Cold Moon (December 7–24): write down three friends or allies who shaped your 2027 vision — and one daily rhythm you will commit to in 2027 to sustain the work.
  3. Act at the Cold Full Moon on December 24: hold Selenite over your workspace or at your crown, speak the rhythm aloud. Schedule the first week of the new rhythm in your calendar.
  4. Reflect at the Aquarius New Moon in February 2027 (your 1st house): how has the rhythm held? Hold Selenite during the review.

Shop Aquarius Crystals for December 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Aquarius crystal guide for stones connected with innovation, intuition, community, and mental clarity — including the Selenite that clears the mental grid so the body can follow. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Aquarius December 2026

Is December 2026 a good month for Aquarius?

It's a community-and-rhythm month. The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 (your 11th house) refreshes friends and future vision. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer on December 24 (your 6th house) illuminates daily work and health.

How will the Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 affect Aquarius?

It falls in your 11th house of friends, groups, networks, and long-term vision — a fresh start in the collective dimension of your life. Gather allies; name the 2027 vision.

What does the Cold Moon in Cancer on December 24 mean for Aquarius?

It falls in your 6th house of work, routine, and health — a practical culmination. Commit to a sustainable rhythm; organize the work; address a wellness practice.

How does Jupiter retrograde (Dec 12) affect Aquarius?

Jupiter retrogrades in your 7th house of partnership and marriage. A central alliance expansion pauses; audit the contract rather than forcing commitment.

What is the best crystal for Aquarius in December 2026?

Selenite — it clears the mental grid so the body can follow, exactly what an 11th house Sagittarius New Moon plus a 6th house Cancer Cold Moon demand. See the full Aquarius crystal guide →
